ChangeRequest.name: Attribute RECL_TRRTRL_UNT in EIL
ChangeRequest.comment:
<!-- See: documentation on [Issues in GitLab](https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/wikis/Issues-in-GitLab) -->
### Overview For AnaCredit reporting we need to create in EIL the attribute RECL_TRRTRL_UNT
### Contact person @Silvia.Giacinti
### Description of change request The RECL_TRRTRL_UNT needs to be added in one of the EIL table dedicated to collateral The computation of the attribute is the following: If RL_ESTT_CLLTRL_LCTN_TYP=TYP_PRTCTN_90 (if Collateral is located in member state)
Reporting agents not required to populate this, it’s done by ECB from the postal code
### Summary of impacted LDM objects/attributes _[EIL collateral tables]_
### Forward Engineering considerations _[Other considerations]_
### Before closing checklist - [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Any other actions to be taken
